meta.title: 综合：现在完成时+比较级

objectives.text: 能在综合语境中运用现在完成时和比较级
掌握两种语法点的填空判断

blocks.content: 现在完成时表示过去发生、对现在有影响的动作，或从过去持续到现在的状态：

rows: I have already finished my homework.
Have you ever been to Beijing?
I have never seen a panda.
She has studied English for 5 years.
So far, we have learned 200 words.

blocks.title: 结构公式
blocks.content: 现在完成时 = have/has + 过去分词。第三人称单数用 has，其他人称用 have。
比较级用于两者之间的比较，常见标志词和结构如下：

rows: She is a little older than me.
the + 比较级, the + 比较级
The more you read, the smarter you get.
比较级 + and + 比较级
It is getting colder and colder.

blocks.title: 易错提醒
blocks.content: 比较级前不加 the！the 只用于最高级。比较级变化：短词加 -er，长词前加 more。
最高级用于三者或以上的比较，表示「最…」：

rows: She is the tallest in our class.
He is the best in the school.
She is the oldest of the three.

blocks.title: 比较级vs最高级
blocks.content: 两者比较用比较级（加 -er/more + than），三者以上用最高级（加 the + -est/most）。

solution.content: already 是现在完成时标志词，结构为 have/has + 过去分词。主语 I 用 have，finish 的过去分词是 finished。

problem.content: This book is ___1___ (interesting) than that one.

solution.content: than 是比较级标志词，interesting 是多音节词，比较级用 more interesting。

children.text: 标志词：already, yet, ever, never, since, for
范围：in + 范围 / of + 群体
